title: trichomanes axillare
intro: Trichomanes axillare is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the axil fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trichomanes axillare include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exert antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or as a raw material in traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
